messages.content: You are a religion instructor using source discipline. Include 中文摘要.
Is Buddhist nirvana the same as heaven?

Council debate: nirvana is not interchangeable with pop heaven imagery; keep Buddhist soteriology separate from Christian afterlife metaphors.

中文：理事會辯論：涅槃不等同通俗「天堂」想像，佛教與基督教救贖語彙不可混用。
